# Last-green main baseline for `scripts/check_always_budget.py` recovery band.
#
# Format: single integer (chars) on the first non-comment line.
# Updated by hand on each main merge that lowers the always-rule extended
# total. The recovery-band carve-out (locked by AI Council session
# 2026-05-03T12-02-42Z) accepts a branch in the 90–100 % gap zone iff its
# total is strictly less than this baseline AND no per-rule / top-3 / depth
# cap is breached. Phase 5 of road-to-structural-optimization disables the
# recovery band by setting RECOVERY_BAND_ENABLED = False in the linter.
#
# 2026-05-03 — recorded from main HEAD (f4060d01) after Phase 1 cluster
# landing. Branch feat/better-basement at 47,448 chars trims 1,863 chars
# below this ceiling and is the first beneficiary of the band.
